subcodes.first_line: The eyes of nations have never beheld, nor shall they ever behold, a day more wondrous than this Day, and the ears of the world have heard none like unto it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چشم امم روزی از این روز بدیع بهتر ندیده و نخواهد دید و آذان عالم مانند این
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
